name: Multi-turn Extraction
setup: mmem add 'Project Alpha launched on March 1, budget $200K, lead: Sarah Chen'
mmem add 'Alpha milestone 1 completed March 5, on budget'
mmem add 'Alpha hit blocker March 8: vendor API rate limit, switched to batch processing'
mmem add 'Alpha milestone 2 delayed to March 15 due to API issue'
mmem add 'Alpha back on track March 12, new ETA March 18 for final delivery'
query: Give me a complete status summary of Project Alpha including timeline, budget, blockers, and current status. Be specific with dates.
assertions: Mentions API rate limit as blocker

name: CRM Extraction
setup: mmem add --type observation 'Alice Wang from Acme Corp, deal worth $50K, stage: negotiation, next action: send proposal by Friday'
mmem add --type observation 'Bob Lee from Beta Inc, deal $20K, stage: closed-won, signed March 10'
mmem add --type observation 'Carol Zhang from Gamma Ltd, deal $80K, stage: discovery, first meeting scheduled March 20'
mmem add --type observation 'Alice Wang update: Acme deal increased to $75K after adding enterprise tier'
mmem add --type observation 'Bob Lee churned from Beta Inc, contract cancelled March 15, reason: budget cuts'
query: List all active deals in the pipeline with their current status, amounts, and next steps. Exclude any churned or cancelled deals.

name: Calendar Scheduling
setup: mmem add 'Team standup every Monday Wednesday Friday 10am, room 301'
mmem add 'Dentist appointment March 20 at 2pm, Dr. Li clinic'
mmem add 'Client demo March 20 at 3pm with Acme Corp, need projector'
mmem add 'Lunch with mentor March 21 at 12pm, restaurant TBD'
mmem add 'Update: client demo moved from March 20 to March 22 at 3pm per client request'
query: What do I have scheduled on March 20? Are there any time conflicts? Also tell me about the client demo.
assertions: Does NOT list client demo on March 20 (it was moved)
Mentions client demo is now March 22

name: Travel Planning
setup: mmem add --type preference 'Travel preferences: window seat, vegetarian meals, budget max $3000'
mmem add --type preference 'Allergic to shellfish, must avoid seafood restaurants'
mmem add 'Japan trip itinerary: Tokyo March 15-20, staying at Hotel Sunrise Shinjuku'
mmem add 'Japan trip: Osaka March 20-23, staying at Namba Grand'
mmem add 'Must visit: Tsukiji outer market in Tokyo, Dotonbori in Osaka'
mmem add 'Update: Tokyo hotel changed to Park Hyatt Shinjuku, upgrade from company'
query: Plan my dining for the Japan trip. What are my dietary restrictions? Which restaurants or food areas should I visit and where am I staying?

name: Patient Records
setup: mmem add 'Patient: John Doe, 45M. Chief complaint: persistent headache for 3 days, onset gradual, no fever'
mmem add 'John Doe vitals: BP 140/90, HR 78, Temp 36.8C. History: hypertension, on lisinopril 10mg daily'
mmem add 'John Doe assessment: tension-type headache. Plan: ibuprofen 400mg TID x 5 days, follow-up 1 week'
mmem add 'John Doe follow-up March 12: headache resolved. New complaint: intermittent dizziness past 2 days'
mmem add 'John Doe March 12 assessment: possible medication side effect. Switched lisinopril to losartan 50mg. Recheck BP in 2 weeks'
query: What is John Doe's current medication regimen and active symptoms? What was changed at the last visit and why?
assertions: Switch reason: possible medication side effect

name: HR Candidate Tracking
setup: mmem add 'Candidate: Emily Chen, 8 years Python/Go, applied Senior Backend Engineer. Resume highlights: distributed systems at Stripe, OSS contributor'
mmem add 'Emily Chen phone screen (March 5): strong system design, articulate, asked good questions about team culture. Weakness: limited Kubernetes experience'
mmem add 'Emily Chen onsite round 1 (March 10): coding excellent, solved graph problem in O(n). Interviewer: Mike recommends hire'
mmem add 'Emily Chen onsite round 2 (March 10): system design solid, designed rate limiter with token bucket. Minor gap: monitoring/observability'
mmem add 'Emily Chen decision: extend offer. Competing offer from Datadog. Need to move fast, compensation committee approved $180K + equity'
query: Summarize Emily Chen's interview journey, strengths, weaknesses, and current offer status. What should we be aware of?

name: Paper Management
setup: mmem add 'Paper: Attention Is All You Need (Vaswani et al. 2017). Key contribution: transformer architecture with self-attention replacing RNNs. Citation count: 120K+'
mmem add 'Paper: BERT (Devlin et al. 2019). Bidirectional pre-training on transformers. Introduced masked language modeling. Built on Vaswani 2017'
mmem add 'Paper: GPT-3 (Brown et al. 2020). 175B parameter autoregressive LM. Key finding: few-shot learning emerges at scale without fine-tuning'
mmem add 'Paper: Graphiti (Zep, 2025). Temporal knowledge graph for agent memory. Bi-temporal model with episode-to-entity consolidation. Uses Neo4j'
mmem add 'Research note: Graphiti approach is most relevant to our memory architecture but we chose SQLite over Neo4j for zero-infra constraint'
query: What papers have I read about memory and knowledge representation? How do they relate to each other? What design decisions did we make based on them?
assertions: Connects Graphiti to our memory architecture

name: Research Auto-Search
setup: mmem add --type decision 'Research question: Does ACT-R activation improve retrieval over simple Ebbinghaus decay?'
mmem add 'Finding: Ebbinghaus curve R(t)=e^(-t/S) is too aggressive for agent memory. 100-day-old facts essentially invisible'
mmem add 'Finding: ACT-R base-level activation B=ln(n+1)-0.5*ln(d+1) balances recency and frequency naturally'
mmem add 'Dead end: tried frequency-only boosting, but rarely-accessed important facts get buried'
mmem add 'Conclusion: ACT-R with importance weighting is the best approach. Implemented as score = importance * sigmoid(A)'
query: What is the current state of our research on memory decay models? What did we try, what failed, and what did we conclude?

name: Work Project from Chat
setup: mmem add 'hey deploy is blocked bc jenkins down, @mike looking into it, eta 2hrs'
mmem add 'update: jenkins back, deploy succeeded to staging. monitoring for 30min before prod'
mmem add 'staging looks good, all health checks green. pushing to prod now'
mmem add 'prod deploy done. but seeing elevated p99 latency on /api/search endpoint, 800ms vs normal 200ms'
mmem add 'root cause found: new search index not warmed up. cache warming job kicked off, eta 1hr to normalize'
query: What happened with today's deployment? What issues came up and what is the current status?
assertions: Mentions Jenkins outage as initial blocker
